{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231419537DD73CBFE10544EA2109"}"},"total":359},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604858455468884760","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！看了第一部，就想接着看第二部，如愿以偿！就想看看吴玫和县长有没有后续呢[已种草]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770647010,"group_id":"7584661403710016537","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1K+PnHEE9zfTUOuWKB4meFIfHPBGR8jWGfzx3gFpjRd","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2913042153866608","user_name":"阿巴该图洲渚的幽罗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2913042153866608","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7584661403710016537","book_info":{"abstract":"农村出身的吴玫，凭借过硬的能力与清醒的心智，在县机关站稳脚跟后，又通过遴选一路向上，进入省级部门，开启了职业生涯的新篇章。在事业与家庭双丰收的时刻，吴玫仿佛迎来了“上岸”后的岁月静好。
 
     可树欲静而风不止，正当她沉浸在婚后的幸福生活时，一场突如其来的变故，让本该人人称羡的生活，瞬间蒙上了阴影。亲情与爱情，婚姻与事业，名利与权力，吴玫在激流中面临着种种考验，她能否冲破层层阻碍，实现自己的人生价值？
 
请与作者一起走进《机关女人》系列之《机关女人2》，继续见证吴玫在波谲云诡的官场中，如何破局重生，书写属于自己的从政人生……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5986be57471cb6d8f6406683b6f30bcd","author":"北宫罗老头","author_id":"","book_id":"7584661403710016537","book_name":"机关女人2","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#880808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":862,"name":"家长里短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=862&name=家长里短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585048623885320729","read_count":"106171","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"458285"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"166","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家庭,家长里短,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/66aa9454ac8c0045b0ef59c9e105eaed~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430793&x-signature=N9uzW6YIUSKZ1BA%2B28s%2FkhXFAvM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"91580538821","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231419537DD73CBFE10544EA2109"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4003,"reply_count":0,"show_pv
